ideal_issue_50_v1_to_retest_stream.reason: retest pack has aggregate reports but no pair-level SQLite cache or per-pair claim stream

loss_criteria.brier: loss if model Brier is not strictly lower than base-rate-only Brier
loss_criteria.reliability_slope: loss if weighted decile reliability slope is outside [0.5, 1.5] or unidentifiable

corpus_map_repeat_split.noise_class_priced: attribute-prompt/repeat-draw noise on k>=4 map-cache pairs; presentation order is counterbalanced inside the supported subset where present

judge_bench_order_split.noise_class_priced: within-run presentation-order noise; not session noise
